note: Recorded outputs for the Module 4 reflection lab/assignment, so it runs with NO live earlier agent. attempt() pops the next item; is_good() checks success_substring is present. The list goes bad -> bad -> good, so reflect_and_retry should succeed on the 3rd attempt (2 retries).
task: Write a one-sentence summary of why someone might cycle to work, naming a concrete benefit.
attempts: Cycling is a thing some people do to get around sometimes.
Cycling to work is popular in many cities these days.
Cycling to work has a clear benefit: it builds daily exercise into your commute while cutting travel cost.
critiques: Too vague — names no concrete benefit; revise to state one.
Still no concrete benefit named; say what you actually gain.
